notes: Intransitive ma- verb. Only actor focus is used.

examples.english: He wants to bathe before eating.
You need to bathe every day.

examples.tagalog: Naligo na ako; handa na akong lumabas.
examples.english: I already bathed; I am ready to go out.

examples.tagalog: Naliligo siya ngayon; hintayin mo siya.
examples.english: She is bathing right now; wait for her.

examples.tagalog: Naliligo ang mga bata sa ilog tuwing tag-init.
examples.english: The children bathe in the river every summer.

examples.tagalog: Maliligo siya sa umaga bago pumasok sa trabaho.
examples.english: She will bathe in the morning before going to work.
